title: The Black Widow
director: Spencer Gordon Bennet, Fred C. Brannon
writer: Franklin Adreon, Basil Dickey, Jesse Duffy
actors: Bruce Edwards, Virginia Lee, Carol Forman
plot: The Daily Clarion hires detective story writer Steve Colt to investigate the deaths of a group of scientists working on an atomic rocket development project. Behind the killings is fortune teller Sombra, a spy from an Asian countr...
